data.title: 国际服主线Vol.EX 第一、二章回顾PV公开
data.summary: A special PV looking back on the stories of Decagrammaton Chapters 1 and 2, narrated by Malkuth, has
data.body:
A special PV looking back on the stories of Decagrammaton Chapters 1 and 2, narrated by Malkuth, has been released! Check it out right now!

🎬https://youtu.be/npsI9dPXaHg
